Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF CHAMBERS & CHAMBERS WINE MERCHANTS' Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order and For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment AS TO (DUXINARO WINE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, dba the WINE SHOP; FINN JACOBSEN, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA THE WINE SHOP; DON TOMFORDE, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA THE WINE SHOP) is granted. No opposition filed . Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported = (302/HEK)
